spec.objective: Author internal/subagent/codex/usage_test.go: offline unit tests for normalizeUsage covering field mapping correctness (prompt_tokens to InputTokens, completion_tokens to OutputTokens, cached_tokens to CacheReadTokens), the CacheCreationTokens equals zero invariant for every input (including populated cached_tokens), CacheSavingsCents computation accuracy, zero usage produces zero-value pkg/dispatch.Usage, and EstimatedCostCents delegates to estimatedCostCents (non-zero for non-zero tokens). Confirm make test exits 0 with the full test suite passing offline as the plan's acceptance gate.
